device_name: LensHooke X1 Pro Semen Quality Analyzer, LensHooke X1 Semen Quality Analyzer
intended_use: LensHooke X1 Semen Quality Analyzer used with LensHooke Semen Test Cassette is an optical device for human semen analysis which provides direct and calculated quantitative measurements for: Sperm conc
intended_use_full: LensHooke X1 Semen Quality Analyzer used with LensHooke Semen Test Cassette is an optical device for human semen analysis which provides direct and calculated quantitative measurements for: Sperm concentration (10^6 per ml), Total motility (PR+NP, %), Sperm morphology (normal forms, %), pH value. The LensHooke X1 Semen Quality Analyzer does not provide a comprehensive evaluation of a male's fertility status. It is a self-testing, in-vitro diagnostic systems intended for human semen analysis of individuals at home to evaluate male fertility.
ground_truth: SQA-V Analyzer (predicate device, k021746) for semen measurements; pH meter for pH measurements
other_metrics: Repeatability CV within 10% for pH, Concentration, Motility and Morphology; Reproducibility CV within 10%; LoB: 0 10^6/mL, LoD: 1.8 10^6/mL, LoQ: 7.2 10^6/mL; Linearity from 2 to 350 x10^6/mL (mean slope above 0.95, R2 above 0.99); pH linearity from 5.8 to 8.2; Sample volume: 35-45 μL for semen (CV within 5%, bias within 20%); Operating conditions: 15-38°C and 50-90% relative humidity (bias within 10%); Shelf life estimated at 2 years at room temperature based on accelerated stability at 40°C for 8 months
